_doc: Automation-ready alert rule definitions for Havn garden. These are v2 definitions -- not live HA automations yet. 3 rules per bed (dry, wet, frost) = 15 total.

message.en: Bed A (His Bed) soil moisture is below 40% -- time to water!
message.da: Bed A (Hans Bed) jordfugtighed er under 40% -- tid til at vande!

message.en: Bed A (His Bed) soil moisture is above 50% -- soil may be too wet for lambs ear.
message.da: Bed A (Hans Bed) jordfugtighed er over 50% -- jorden kan vaere for vad til lammeoere.

message.en: Frost warning for Bed A (His Bed)! Soil temperature at 0C. Cover sensitive plants with fleece.
message.da: Frostadvarsel for Bed A (Hans Bed)! Jordtemperatur ved 0C. Daek folsomme planter med fiberdug.

message.en: Bed B (Raspberry Bed) soil moisture is below 25% -- raspberries need water!
message.da: Bed B (Hindbaerbed) jordfugtighed er under 25% -- hindbaer har brug for vand!

message.en: Bed B (Raspberry Bed) soil moisture is above 65% -- too wet, risk of root rot.
message.da: Bed B (Hindbearbed) jordfugtighed er over 65% -- for vadt, risiko for rodraad.

message.en: Extreme frost warning for Bed B (Raspberry Bed)! Soil at -15C. Mulch heavily to protect roots.
message.da: Ekstrem frostadvarsel for Bed B (Hindbearbed)! Jord ved -15C. Dak godt med barkflis.

message.en: Bed C (Shared Bed) soil moisture is below 45% -- cucumbers and tomatoes need water!
message.da: Bed C (Faellesbed) jordfugtighed er under 45% -- agurker og tomater har brug for vand!

message.en: Bed C (Shared Bed) soil moisture is above 65% -- too wet for borage.
message.da: Bed C (Faellesbed) jordfugtighed er over 65% -- for vadt til hjulkrone.

message.en: Cold warning for Bed C (Shared Bed)! Soil at 4C -- cucumbers, basil, and peppers are frost-sensitive. Cover or bring indoors.
message.da: Kuldeadvarsel for Bed C (Faellesbed)! Jord ved 4C -- agurker, basilikum og peberfrugter er frostfolsomme. Daek til eller tag ind.

message.en: Bed D (Terrace Herb Bed) soil moisture is below 40% -- lettuce and herbs need water!
message.da: Bed D (Terrasseurtbed) jordfugtighed er under 40% -- salat og urter har brug for vand!

message.en: Bed D (Terrace Herb Bed) soil moisture is above 55% -- too wet for thyme.
message.da: Bed D (Terrasseurtbed) jordfugtighed er over 55% -- for vadt til timian.

message.en: Frost warning for Bed D (Terrace Herb Bed)! Soil at -3C. Lettuce is most sensitive -- cover with fleece.
message.da: Frostadvarsel for Bed D (Terrasseurtbed)! Jord ved -3C. Salat er mest folsom -- daek med fiberdug.

message.en: Bed E (Terrace Flower Bed) soil moisture is below 40% -- broccoli and beans need water!
message.da: Bed E (Terrasseblomsterbed) jordfugtighed er under 40% -- broccoli og boenner har brug for vand!

message.en: Bed E (Terrace Flower Bed) soil moisture is above 65% -- too wet for borage and calendula.
message.da: Bed E (Terrasseblomsterbed) jordfugtighed er over 65% -- for vadt til hjulkrone og morgenfrue.

message.en: Cold warning for Bed E (Terrace Flower Bed)! Soil at 2C -- beans are frost-sensitive. Cover tonight.
message.da: Kuldeadvarsel for Bed E (Terrasseblomsterbed)! Jord ved 2C -- boenner er frostfolsomme. Daek til i aften.
